prompt: colorful fun sales flyer for a 2nd grader's school entrepreneur fair. Product: Avie's Utility Pouches. Handmade paper pouches, each one unique. Price: ONLY $5. Big bold text at top: AVIE'S UTILITY POUCHES. Below that: Every Pouch is One-of-a-Kind! Subtext: Perfect for Pokemon cards, secret notes, friendship bracelets, rocks, treasures, and MORE. Center features cute illustrations of colorful paper pouches with different designs (hearts, stars, sunshine, stripes). Bottom text: ONLY $5 EACH — While Supplies Last! Small text: Handmade with love by Avie. Color palette: bright pink, teal, yellow, purple on white. Kid-friendly, gender-neutral, exciting energy like a real product ad but made for kids. Include a small AUP logo mark in corner. Clean, printable, 8.5x11 flyer format. Fun bubble letters mixed with clean text.
